ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Grade level of the player (e.g., 10th, 12th) */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Position played by the player (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "academic_gpa" TEXT /* Academic GPA of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., 10th, 12th) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these statistics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with these statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these game statistics */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in this game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in this game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in this game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in this game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in this game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player in this game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_sessions" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the practice session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the practice session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach leading the practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_practice_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the practice session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the player attended the practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_practice_attendance_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES practice_sessions ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_practice_attendance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
